issues.description: The neuroblast node conflates three developmental stages (type-2a: Nestin+/Sox2+, type-2b: Nestin+/DCX+, type-3: DCX+ only) that have distinct marker profiles. These may warrant separate nodes.

Anatomical location is recorded as UBERON:0004023 (ganglionic eminence) as a placeholder for SGZ — the subgranular zone of the dentate gyrus does not have a dedicated UBERON or MBA term. The correct UBERON region for the broader structure is UBERON:0001885 (dentate gyrus). Needs ontology term verification.

NT type is listed as 'glutamatergic (committed but not yet functional)'. The neuroblast is not yet synaptically integrated so calling it glutamatergic is anticipatory. No quote directly characterises the NT type of neuroblasts specifically; the glutamatergic assignment derives from the lineage endpoint.
No quotes characterise the electrophysiological properties of type-3 neuroblasts. The proposed_types.json summary acknowledges this gap. Primary literature search needed.
No neuropeptide information available from the report for neuroblasts.

gaps: species: multiple species referenced but not confirmed
anatomical_location: SGZ has no dedicated ontology term — needs verification

issues.description: Electrophysiology described only as 'synaptically integrating' with glutamatergic input from entorhinal cortex. No detailed characterisation of intrinsic electrophysiological properties (e.g., firing pattern, input resistance, resting potential) from the available quotes.
No neuropeptide information available from the report for immature granule neurons.

gaps: electrophysiology_class: only connectivity described, not intrinsic properties
species: multiple species referenced but not confirmed
cl_mapping: no CL term exists — potential CL contribution needed

issues.description: Electrophysiology described only as 'fully synaptically integrated'. No detailed characterisation of intrinsic electrophysiological properties from the available quotes. Well-characterised in primary literature but not captured in this report's quotes.
No neuropeptide information available from the report for mature granule neurons.

gaps: electrophysiology_class: only connectivity described, not intrinsic properties
species: multiple species referenced but not confirmed
